description: You are an epidemiologist at a regional public health department preparing the weekly respiratory virus surveillance dashboard. The python data pipeline runs without errors, but the charts are visibly wrong: dates are scrambled, early data before March is missing, the 'Daily New Cases' metric looks like an ever-increasing staircase instead of daily spikes, the 'Cases per 100k' rates are incorrectly scaled, and the 7-day rolling average is chaotic. The code is located at /home/ga/workspace/surveillance_pipeline/. Find and fix all 5 data processing bugs across the pipeline files so the test suite passes.
